creator: j@uriah.heep.sax.de
text:
As ac199@hwcn.org wrote:

>  Bill Fenner, in a message dated Sun, 19 Jan 1997 20:40:53 PST, on the
>  FreeBSD-bugs list, with the subject "Re: bin/2528: fetch(1)'s timeout is
>  ridiculously short", blamed this on the ">>" string being at the start of
>  some lines.

Probably.  I've tried to reproduce it locally, but it seems this
doesn't happen inside send-pr.  So it's likely a GNATS server issue.

Unless Steve or Paul are going to look after this, i'd suggest to set
the state of this PR to `suspended', since we are unlikely to ever fix
it inside the FreeBSD group.

-- 
cheers, J"org

joerg_wunsch@uriah.heep.sax.de -- http://www.sax.de/~joerg/ -- NIC: JW11-RIPE
Never trust an operating system you don't have sources for. ;-)
